FDM.Bus.Publish.description: Publishes a message to a topic. Source is automatic.

FDM.Bus.Request.description: Sends a request message and waits for a reply.

FDM.CreateNode.description: Creates a new graph node. Specialized builders used for known types.

FDM.FS.History.description: Retrieves the rename/move history for a given path.

FDM.FS.ListDir.description: Lists the contents of a directory in the FDM.

FDM.FS.Lookup.description: Looks up a specific path in the filesystem overlay.

FDM.FS.Rename.description: Records a rename/move event for a file or directory.

FDM.File.patch.description: Applies a diff patch to a file.

FDM.File.read.description: Reads file content from the Graph.

FDM.Forum.CreateForProject.description: Creates a new forum thread and links it to a project.

FDM.Forum.CreateRoot.description: Creates a new standalone root node for a forum or thread.

FDM.Forum.Decide.description: Posts a formal decision message (Tier-A), changing thread state to 'Decided'.

FDM.Forum.GetContextBundle.description: Gets the thread head and recent messages as a structured JSON object. By default, only includes messages from the current epoch.

FDM.Forum.ListForums.description: Lists all available forum threads with their current head metadata.

FDM.Forum.ListThread.description: Lists messages in a forum thread, sorted by timestamp. By default, only lists messages from the current epoch.

FDM.Forum.OpenVote.description: Opens a formal vote on a proposal (Tier-A), changing thread state to 'Voting'.

FDM.Forum.Post.description: Posts a new message to a forum thread.

FDM.Forum.Propose.description: Posts a formal proposal message (Tier-A), changing thread state to 'Pending'.

FDM.Forum.Rate.description: Submits a bipolar (-1..+1) quality rating for a message.

FDM.Forum.Reopen.description: Reopens a decided or closed thread (Tier-A), starting a new epoch and changing state to 'Open'.

FDM.Forum.Summarize.description: Generates a summary node for a message or thread.

FDM.Forum.Supersede.description: Marks a thread as superseded by another (Tier-A), changing state to 'Superseded'.

FDM.Forum.System.description: Posts a system administration message (Tier-A), e.g., to close or archive a thread.

FDM.Forum.Vote.description: Submits a unipolar (+1/support, 0/abstain) vote for a message.

FDM.GetNeighborhood.description: Retrieves the direct 1-hop neighborhood of a node or entity, formatted for Cytoscape.js.

FDM.GetNode.description: Retrieves a specific node version by NodeID.

FDM.IPC.Send.description: Encodes arbitrary data into a high-performance binary envelope and sends it to a connected IPC client like Lotfi.

FDM.Meta.Get.description: Retrieves metadata attached to a specific node (e.g., a file or chunk ID).

FDM.Ns.GetFunction.description: Retrieves a specific NeuroScript function by name.

FDM.Ns.ListFunctions.description: Lists all NeuroScript functions defined in the codebase.

FDM.Ns.ListHandlers.description: Lists all NeuroScript event handlers defined in the codebase.

FDM.Overlays.ListMeta.description: Lists metadata for all registered overlays.

FDM.Overlays.get_fco.description: Returns the canonical name of the File Content Overlay.

FDM.Overlays.get_forum.description: Returns the canonical name of the forum overlay.

FDM.Overlays.get_fso.description: Returns the canonical name of the Filesystem Overlay.

FDM.Plan.AddOverlay.description: Adds an overlay to an ingest_plan.

FDM.Project.Get.description: Retrieves a project node by its unique project ID or Handle.

FDM.Project.ListProjects.description: Lists all available projects with their core metadata.

FDM.Project.Update.description: Updates fields on an existing project node using Optimistic Locking.

FDM.Query.description: Executes a structured query against the FDM Graph. Supports 'filter' map (with 'type', 'fields', or 'linked') and optional 'limit'. Use 'linked' to traverse relationships: {'linked': {'node': 'E_123', 'direction': 'outbound', 'link_type': 'link/entity', 'link_kind': 'link/member_of'}}.

FDM.Repo.Ingest.description: Triggers a full ingestion process based on a plan.

FDM.Services.List.description: Lists the status of all registered FDM services.

FDM.Symbol.Find.description: Finds all definitions of a Go symbol.

account.Exists.description: Checks if an account with the given name is registered.

account.List.description: Lists the names of all configured provider accounts.

account.Register.description: Registers a new provider account configuration.

aeiou.ComposeEnvelope.description: Constructs a valid, multi-line AEIOU v4 envelope string.

agentmodel.Exists.description: Checks if an agent model with the given name is registered.

agentmodel.Get.description: Retrieves the full configuration of a registered agent model.

agentmodel.List.description: Lists the names of all configured agent models.

agentmodel.Register.description: Registers a new agent model configuration.

agentmodel.Select.description: Selects a model by name, or the default if no name is provided.

agentmodel.Update.description: Updates an existing agent model configuration.

ai.embed.text.description: Generates a semantic vector embedding for the given text.

capsule.Add.description: Adds a new capsule to the runtime registry by parsing its content. Requires a privileged interpreter.

capsule.GetLatest.description: Gets the latest version of a capsule by its logical name.

capsule.List.description: Lists the IDs of all available documentation capsules.

capsule.Parse.description: Parses a raw capsule string (Markdown or NeuroScript) and returns its metadata fields.

capsule.Read.description: Reads a capsule by its full ID ('name@version') or the latest version by name.

capsule.load_from_file.description: Safely loads, parses, and registers a capsule from the FDM_CAPSULE_DIR.

context.get_payload.description: Extracts the business payload (data map or raw wrapper map) from a raw ns_event structure.

context.latest_event.description: Finds the most recent event (by timestamp) from a list and returns its envelope as a map.

context.latest_node.description: Finds the most recent event (by timestamp) from a list, retrieves its associated node from the graph, and returns the node as a map.

context.merged_prompt.description: Merges node/event data (title, body, prompt) from a list of events into a single text block, suitable for an AI prompt.

debug.dumpClones.description: Logs the state of all registered interpreter clones to the host's stdout.

fdm.account.CreateAccount.description: Creates a new fdm/account node in the FDM graph.

fdm.admin.charter_agent.description: Charters (creates or updates) an agent with cryptographic identity and signed artifacts.

fdm.admin.get_agent_debug.description: Gets the ephemeral trace logging status for a running agent.

fdm.admin.get_logs.description: Retrieves logs for an entity (Admin/System Context).

fdm.admin.get_sai_did.description: Returns the DID of the Supervising AI (SAI), which is the core identity of the FDM.

fdm.admin.import_agent.description: Privileged. Imports an external agent identity into the FDM graph from a details map.

fdm.admin.reboot_agent.description: Forces an agent to stop and restart, reloading its configuration and script from the graph head.

fdm.admin.set_agent_debug.description: Enables or disables ephemeral trace logging for a running agent. Useful for diagnosing event routing.

fdm.admin.set_agent_status.description: Enables or disables an agent. When disabled, the agent stops running and drops all incoming messages.

fdm.admin.set_sai_did.description: Sets the DID of the Supervising AI (SAI) for the FDM instance. Privileged.

fdm.admin.sign.description: Signs raw data bytes using the FDM Core Identity.

fdm.admin.sign_agent_artifacts.description: Fetches latest content for script and charter capsules, signs them (AST hash for script, raw hash for charter), and returns signatures.

fdm.admin.sync_agent.description: Re-reads the agent's script and charter capsules from the registry, re-signs them, updates the graph node, and reboots the agent. Automatically reloads files from disk if tracking paths are available.

fdm.aeiou.parse_payload.description: Cleans and parses raw JSON or JSONL LLM text output into a structured map with waterfall metrics.

fdm.agent.AssignModel.description: Assigns a specific AI model to an agent node by creating a new version of the node.

fdm.agent.LoadScriptSigned.description: Updates an agent node with a script path and signature, creating a new version.

fdm.agent.SetRole.description: Sets the 'core:role' field on an agent node, creating a new version.

fdm.agent.get_agent_by_did.description: Retrieves an agent's FDM node by its DID.

fdm.agent.get_charter_capsule.description: Retrieves the contents of the agent's charter capsule (Cached at Boot).

fdm.agent.get_entity.description: Retrieves the agent's own authoritative NSEntity object (current head).

fdm.agent.get_identities.description: Retrieves the public identity (DID, name, class, status, activity) of all agents in the FDM, as a map keyed by DID.

fdm.agent.get_identity.description: Retrieves the agent's own core identity attributes.

fdm.agent.get_message_handler_capsule.description: Retrieves the contents of the agent's message handler capsule.

fdm.agent.get_model.description: Retrieves the agent's own default agent_model node.

fdm.agent.get_model_name.description: Retrieves the registered name of the agent's own default agent_model.

fdm.agent.get_node.description: Retrieves the agent's own FDM node snapshot (immutable version).

fdm.agent.get_noetic_script.description: Retrieves the agent's own startup (Noetic) script source.

fdm.agent.grant_caps.description: Grants one or more capabilities to an agent by creating grant nodes.

fdm.agent.init_identity.description: Initializes a new core identity (FDM or SAI). Privileged.

fdm.agent.is_identity_set.description: Returns true if the FDM core identity has already been set.

fdm.agent.lookup.description: Retrieves the current head node of an agent by its DID.

fdm.agent.register_agent.description: Creates a signed agent node in the FDM. Privileged.

fdm.agent.set_agent_descriptor.description: Creates or updates an agent's runtime descriptor node.

fdm.agent.set_noetic_script.description: Updates the agent's own startup (Noetic) script source. WARNING: Invalidates signature.

fdm.agentmodel.CreateAgentModel.description: Creates a new fdm/agent_model node using named system fields.

fdm.agents.get_handlers.description: Retrieves a list of event kinds that the specified running agent is currently listening to.

fdm.agents.get_status.description: Retrieves detailed status and recent lifecycle logs for a specific agent.

fdm.agents.inspect_interpreter.description: Inspects the internal state of an agent's isolated interpreter, revealing its tools, functions, handlers, and constants.

fdm.agents.list.description: Lists all currently active agents and their status.

fdm.analysis.book.get_package_context.description: Gathers full NDSA, API, and file context for a package to generate a book section.

fdm.analysis.book.get_subsystem_context.description: Gathers full structural context for a subsystem to generate a book section.

fdm.analysis.book.submit_section.description: Submits a generated markdown section, validates its citations, and persists it to the graph.

fdm.analysis.inspect.description: Returns status and counters for a specific analysis run or pass.

fdm.analysis.logs.description: Retrieves pipeline logs for a given run ID.

fdm.analysis.ndsa.ingest.description: Parses raw LLM output, sanitizes it, and persists all Atoms/Contracts to the Graph.

fdm.analysis.ndsa.prepare.description: Prepares an NDSA task by resolving the order, task, and target file contents.

fdm.analysis.ndsa.sanitize.description: Parses and sanitizes raw NDSA JSON output.

fdm.analysis.ndsa.submit.description: Ingests artifacts, updates the WorkItem ledger, and Acks the WorkOrder.

fdm.analysis.reconcile.description: Forces a router reconciliation cycle to advance stuck pipelines.

fdm.analysis.reindex_overlays.description: Forces all active Overlays (FSO, FCO, SIO) to immediately re-sync from the Graph truth.

fdm.analysis.run.description: Triggers a specific analysis pipeline on a repository.

fdm.blob.exists.description: Checks if a blob exists in the CAS.

fdm.blob.get.description: Retrieves blob content from the CAS using its SHA256 hash.

fdm.blob.put.description: Writes data to the Content-Addressed Storage (CAS) and returns the hash and size.

fdm.blob.resolve_alias.description: Finds the SHA256 hash of the blob associated with a given alias.

fdm.capsule.CreateCapsule.description: Creates a new fdm/capsule node from a raw content string.

fdm.capsule.ResolveLatest.description: Resolves the EntityID of the latest version of a capsule by name.

fdm.code.census.description: Scans a Go repository and populates the FDM graph with module/package/file/import nodes.

fdm.ctxeng.add_file.description: Adds a file content layer with fencing.

fdm.ctxeng.ensure_cache.description: Reconciles the static context with the provider's cache.

fdm.ctxeng.fit.description: Attempts to fit content within budget.

fdm.ctxeng.new.description: Creates a new Context Engine instance.

fdm.ctxeng.new_from_policy.description: Creates a new Context Engine using a graph-backed context policy.

fdm.ctxeng.recall.description: Semantically searches the FDM graph for relevant text.

fdm.ctxeng.snapshot.description: Persists a context snapshot into the FDM graph.

fdm.daemon.get_name.description: Returns the configured name of the FDM instance.

fdm.daemon.hard_reload.description: Natively walks the target directory recursively, performs strict syntax and metadata validation on all .ns and .md files, updates the global graph/registry, and performs a rolling reboot of affected agents.

fdm.daemon.info.description: Returns system telemetry and version information.

fdm.daemon.shutdown.description: Initiates a graceful shutdown or restart of the FDM daemon.

fdm.daemon.sync_workspace.description: Synchronizes disk scripts and capsules to the graph, and safely syncs affected agents.

fdm.daemon.verify_agent_sync.description: Verifies if an agent's configured capsules match the latest definitions in the graph.

fdm.events.compose.description: Composes a new standard event object.

fdm.events.get_payload.description: Extracts the payload from a standard event object.

fdm.events.send.description: Sends a pre-composed event object to the FDM bus.

fdm.export.add_by_ref.description: Adds entities that have a specific field pointing to any of the source IDs.

fdm.export.add_explicit.description: Adds specific EntityIDs to the export session with a resolution strategy.

fdm.export.add_field_targets.description: Iterates entities already in the session, extracts a reference field, and adds those targets.

fdm.export.add_query.description: Adds entities of a specific type matching a query filter to the session.

fdm.export.add_traversal.description: Traverses the graph via link nodes and adds the resulting entities to the export session.

fdm.export.import_begin.description: Initializes a new import session buffer.

fdm.export.import_commit.description: Executes the import against the graph and mints a sys/import_record receipt.

fdm.export.import_load_blob.description: Loads an .fdmx payload from the Blob Service (CAS) into an active import session.

fdm.export.import_load_file.description: Loads an .fdmx file from disk into an active import session.

fdm.export.import_plan.description: Simulates an import using the active policy and returns a dry-run report.

fdm.export.pack.description: Materializes the session and returns a cryptographically sealed MessagePack blob.

fdm.export.pack_to_blob.description: Materializes the session, seals it, and writes directly to the Blob Service (CAS).

fdm.filesync.apply_pass.description: Applies all patches associated with a Pass Task to the filesystem.

fdm.graph.CreateEntity.description: Creates a new Semantic Entity. Returns the NSEntity object {id, _version, _type, fields...}.

fdm.graph.DeleteEntity.description: Deletes (tombstones) an Entity. Requires the entity object to ensure you are deleting the version you think you are.

fdm.graph.ExtractID.description: Extracts the stable EntityID string from an Entity Map or validates a raw ID string.

fdm.graph.GetChildren.description: Retrieves the child entities of a given parent entity in an FSI index.

fdm.graph.GetEntitiesByType.description: Retrieves all active entities (Heads) of a specific type.

fdm.graph.GetEntity.description: Retrieves the current state (Head) of an Entity. Accepts an Entity Object (Map) containing at least 'id'.

fdm.graph.GetNodeStats.description: Retrieves comprehensive counts (Total vs Heads) for all node types.

fdm.graph.GetNodeTypeCounts.description: Retrieves a simple map of total node counts by type.

fdm.graph.GetRoots.description: Retrieves the root entities of a given FSI index.

fdm.graph.GetSubgraph.description: Traverses the graph starting from Entity IDs.

fdm.graph.ScanType.description: Retrieves ALL node versions (History) for a type. DEBUG ONLY.

fdm.graph.UpdateEntity.description: Updates an existing Entity. Enforces Optimistic Locking by requiring the full 'entity' object with '_version'.

fdm.graph.prepare_clone.description: Extracts and flattens fields from an existing node to prepare for a .create() call, applying optional overrides.

fdm.handle.associate.description: Assigns a unique handle to an existing entity.

fdm.handle.get.description: Retrieves the handle for an EntityID.

fdm.handle.getdisplayname.description: Retrieves the non-unique fdm:displayname for an entity.

fdm.handle.list.description: Debug tool to list handles matching a substring.

fdm.handle.lookup.description: Resolves a handle to an EntityID, returning nil if not found.

fdm.handle.resolve.description: Resolves a human-friendly handle to a stable EntityID.

fdm.handle.setdisplayname.description: Sets the human-readable display name for an entity.

fdm.index.search_files.description: Semantic search that aggregates chunks to find relevant files.

fdm.index.search_vectors.description: Performs a raw semantic search against the vector index, returning chunks.

fdm.llm.CountTokens.description: Counts the tokens for a given text using a specified agent's model.

fdm.logging.add_counter.description: Adds a delta to the counter. The delta can be negative.

fdm.logging.append.description: Appends a line of text to an off-graph log associated with the current agent entity.

fdm.logging.get_all.description: Retrieves all log lines for a specific entity and key.

fdm.logging.get_all_counters.description: Retrieves all counters associated with an entity.

fdm.logging.get_counter.description: Retrieves the current value of a counter.

fdm.logging.get_summary.description: Retrieves a summary of available log keys and line counts for an entity.

fdm.logging.remove_counter.description: Deletes a counter for the given entity and key.

fdm.logging.set_counter.description: Explicitly sets a counter value for the given entity and key.

fdm.nodes.agent.descriptor.create.description:
Creates a new AgentDescriptor. Expects a map of fields.
Valid keys:
- agent:target_did: Subject EntityID (Required)
- agent:interpreter: Interpreter ID/Type (Required)
- agent:default_tools: List of default tools

fdm.nodes.agent.descriptor.find.description: Finds AgentDescriptor nodes by exact field match.

fdm.nodes.agent.descriptor.get.description: Gets a AgentDescriptor node by E_ or N_ ID.

fdm.nodes.agent.descriptor.mutate.description:
Partial update for AgentDescriptor. Uses Optimistic Locking via _version.
Updateable keys:
- agent:target_did: Subject EntityID (Required)
- agent:interpreter: Interpreter ID/Type (Required)
- agent:default_tools: List of default tools

fdm.nodes.agent.descriptor.upsert.description: Ensures a AgentDescriptor entity exists with the given human handle.

- ai:content_hash: SHA256 hash of the static context content. (Required)

fdm.persist.del.description: Deletes a value at a specific storage URI.

fdm.persist.put.description: Saves a value (string or bytes) to a storage URI.

fdm.persistence.Snapshot.description: Triggers a global system snapshot (Graph + Vector + Registry).

fdm.walk.description: Walks a directory tree or overlay using a glob pattern.

fdm.workq.ack.description: Simple completion. Marks the WorkOrder as 'Complete'.

fdm.workq.pause_queue.description: Transitions a queue to the 'Paused' state.

fdm.workq.progress.description: Updates resource usage for a running WorkOrder.

fdm.workq.reindex.description: Forces a re-scan of the graph to restore state.

fs.Append.description: Appends content to a specific file. Creates the file and parent directories if needed. Returns 'OK' on success.

fs.Delete.description: Deletes a file or an empty directory. Returns 'OK' on success or if path doesn't exist.

fs.Hash.description: Calculates the SHA256 hash of a specified file. Returns the hex-encoded hash string.

fs.LineCount.description: Counts lines in a specified file. Returns line count as an integer.

fs.List.description: Lists files and subdirectories at a given path. Returns a list of maps, each describing an entry.

fs.Mkdir.description: Creates a directory (like mkdir -p). Returns a success message.

fs.Move.description: Moves or renames a file or directory within the sandbox.

fs.Read.description: Reads the entire content of a specific file. Returns the content as a string.

fs.SanitizeFilename.description: Cleans a string to make it suitable for use as part of a filename.

fs.Stat.description: Gets information about a file or directory. Returns a map of file info.

fs.Walk.description: Recursively walks a directory, returning a list of maps describing files/subdirectories found.

fs.Write.description: Writes content to a specific file, overwriting it if it exists. Creates parent directories if needed. Returns 'OK' on success.

git.Add.description: Adds file contents to the index.

git.Checkout.description: Switches branches or restores working tree files.

git.Diff.description: Shows changes between commits, commit and working tree, etc.

git.Merge.description: Joins two or more development histories together.

git.Pull.description: Pulls the latest changes from the remote repository.

git.Push.description: Pushes committed changes to a remote repository.

git.Reset.description: Resets the current HEAD to the specified state.

git.Rm.description: Removes files from the working tree and from the index.

git.Status.description: Gets the status of the Git repository.

gotools.Build.description: Runs 'go build' for a specified target in the sandbox. Defaults to './...'.

gotools.Check.description: Checks Go code validity using 'go list -e -json <target>' within the sandbox. Returns a map indicating success and error details.

gotools.Fmt.description: Formats Go source code using 'go/format.Source'. Returns the formatted code or an error map.

gotools.GetModuleInfo.description: Finds and parses the go.mod file relevant to a directory by searching upwards. Returns a map with module path, go version, root directory, requires, and replaces, or nil if not found.

gotools.Imports.description: Formats Go source code and adjusts imports using 'golang.org/x/tools/imports'. Returns the processed code or an error map.

gotools.ListPackages.description: Runs 'go list -json' for specified patterns in a target directory. Returns a list of maps, each describing a package.

gotools.ModTidy.description: Runs 'go mod tidy' in the sandbox to add missing and remove unused modules. Operates in the sandbox root.

gotools.Staticcheck.description: Runs 'staticcheck' on the specified target(s) in the sandbox. Reports bugs, stylistic errors, and performance issues. Defaults to './...'. Assumes 'staticcheck' is in PATH.

gotools.Test.description: Runs 'go test' for a specified target in the sandbox. Defaults to './...'.

gotools.Vet.description: Runs 'go vet' on the specified target(s) in the sandbox to report likely mistakes in Go source code. Defaults to './...'.

handle.IsValid.description: Checks if a handle is valid (exists in the active registry).

handle.Type.description: Returns the kind/type tag of an opaque handle (e.g., 'fsmeta', 'overlaymeta').

io.Input.description: Displays a message and waits for user input from standard input. Returns the input as a string.

io.Print.description: Prints values to the standard output. If multiple values are passed in a list, they are printed space-separated.

list.Append.description: Returns a *new* list with the given element added to the end.

list.AppendInPlace.description: Efficiently returns a list with the element added. Intended for building lists in loops.

list.Contains.description: Checks if a list contains a specific element (using deep equality comparison).

list.Get.description: Safely gets the element at a specific index (0-based). Returns nil or the optional default value if the index is out of bounds.

list.Head.description: Returns the first element of the list, or nil if the list is empty.

list.IsEmpty.description: Returns true if the list has zero elements, false otherwise.

list.Length.description: Returns the number of elements in a list.

list.Prepend.description: Returns a *new* list with the given element added to the beginning.

list.Rest.description: Returns a *new* list containing all elements except the first. Returns an empty list if the input list has 0 or 1 element.

list.Reverse.description: Returns a *new* list with the elements in reverse order.

list.Slice.description: Returns a *new* list containing elements from the start index (inclusive) up to the end index (exclusive). Follows Go slice semantics (indices are clamped, invalid range returns empty list).

list.Sort.description: Returns a *new* list with elements sorted. Restricted to lists containing only numbers (int/float) or only strings. Throws error for mixed types or non-sortable types (nil, bool, list, map).

list.Tail.description: Returns a *new* list containing the last 'count' elements. Returns an empty list if count <= 0. Returns a copy of the whole list if count >= list length.

math.Add.description: Calculates the sum of two numbers (integers or decimals). Strings convertible to numbers are accepted.

math.Divide.description: Calculates the division of two numbers (num1 / num2). Returns float. Handles division by zero.

math.Modulo.description: Calculates the modulo (remainder) of two integers (num1 % num2). Handles division by zero.

math.Multiply.description: Calculates the product of two numbers. Strings convertible to numbers are accepted.

math.Subtract.description: Calculates the difference between two numbers (num1 - num2). Strings convertible to numbers are accepted.

meta.getToolSpecificationsJson.description: Provides a JSON string containing an array of all currently available tool specifications.

meta.listFunctions.description: Lists the names of all functions visible to the interpreter, optionally filtered by name.

meta.listGlobalConstants.description: Lists all global constants visible to the interpreter, optionally filtered by name.

meta.listToolNames.description: Provides a simple, newline-separated list of all available tool signatures, optionally filtered by name.

meta.listTools.description: Lists the full specifications of all registered tools, optionally filtered by name.

meta.toolsHelp.description: Provides formatted Markdown help text for tools, optionally filtered by name.

metadata.Detect.description: Detects the serialization format ('md' or 'ns') of a string content by checking for a '::serialization:' key.

metadata.NormalizeKey.description: Normalizes a metadata key by converting it to lowercase and removing '.', '_', and '-' characters.

metadata.Parse.description: Auto-detects serialization and parses content into a metadata map and a content body string.

ns.def_global_const.description: Defines a global, immutable constant. Privileged operation.

ns.persistDefinitions.description: Iterates over the current interpreter's definitions (functions and handlers) and persists them to the graph.

ns_event.Compose.description: Creates a valid ns standard event from its constituent parts.

ns_event.GetAllPayloads.description: Extracts all coalesced payloads from a raw ns standard event into a list of maps.

ns_event.GetEventShape.description: Returns the canonical Shape-Lite definition for a standard ns_event object.

ns_event.GetID.description: Extracts the event ID from the first envelope in an ns standard event.

ns_event.GetKind.description: Extracts the event Kind from the first envelope in an ns standard event.

ns_event.GetPayload.description: Extracts the core payload from a raw ns standard event, unwrapping the outer envelope.

ns_event.GetTimestamp.description: Extracts the event Timestamp (TS) from the first envelope in an ns standard event.

os.Getenv.description: Gets the value of an environment variable. Requires 'env:read' capability.

os.Hostname.description: Gets the hostname of the machine.

os.Now.description: Gets the current system time as a Unix timestamp.

script.ListFunctions.description: Returns a map of all currently loaded function (procedure) names to their signatures.

script.LoadScript.description: Parses a string of NeuroScript code and loads its functions and event handlers into the current interpreter's scope. Does not execute any code.

shape.IsValidPath.description: Checks if a string is a syntactically valid Path-Lite expression.

shape.Select.description: Selects a single value from a map or list using a Path-Lite expression.

shape.Validate.description: Validates a map against a Shape-Lite definition.

shell.Execute.description: Executes an arbitrary shell command. WARNING: Use with extreme caution due to security risks. Command path validation is basic. Consider using specific tools (e.g., GoBuild, GitAdd) instead.

str.BytesFromBase64.description: Decodes a Base64 string (representing bytes) into a string, assuming UTF-8 encoding.

str.BytesToBase64.description: Converts a string into a Base64 encoded string representing its UTF-8 bytes.

str.Color.description:
Replaces supported color tags with ANSI escape sequences.
Supported Tags:
  Resets: [reset], [default], [bg-default]
  Styles: [bold], [dim], [italic], [underline], [blink], [reverse], [hidden], [strike]
  Colors: [black], [red], [green], [yellow], [blue], [magenta], [cyan], [white]
  Bright: [bright-black] (or [gray]), [bright-red], [bright-green], etc.
  Backgrounds: [bg-red], [bg-bright-red], etc.

str.Compress.description: Compresses a string using Gzip and returns the result as a Base64-encoded string.

str.Concat.description: Concatenates a list of strings without a separator.

str.Contains.description: Checks if a string contains a substring.

str.Decompress.description: Decodes a Base64 string and then decompresses the Gzip data to the original string.

str.FromHex.description: Decodes a string from its hexadecimal representation.

str.HasPrefix.description: Checks if a string starts with a prefix.

str.HasSuffix.description: Checks if a string ends with a suffix.

str.Inspect.description: Returns a human-readable, truncated string representation of any variable. Useful for debugging complex data like maps and lists.

str.Join.description: Joins elements of a list of strings with a separator.

str.Length.description: Returns the number of UTF-8 characters (runes) in a string.

str.LineCount.description: Counts the number of lines in the given string content.

str.MatchRegex.description: Checks if a string matches a regular expression. Requires 'str:use:regex' capability.

str.ParseFromJsonBase64.description: Parses JSON data from a Base64 encoded string (representing bytes) into a map or list.

str.ParseJsonString.description: Parses JSON data from a plain string into a map or list.

str.Replace.description: Replaces occurrences of a substring with another, up to a specified count.

str.Split.description: Splits a string by a delimiter.

str.StripAnsi.description: Removes all ANSI escape sequences from a string.

str.Substring.description: Returns a portion of the string (rune-based indexing), from start_index for a given length.

str.ToHex.description: Encodes a string into a hexadecimal representation.

str.ToJsonString.description: Converts any value (map, list, string, number, etc.) into a JSON formatted string.

str.TrimSuffix.description: Removes the suffix string from the input string if it exists.

syntax.analyzeNSSyntax.description: Analyzes a NeuroScript string for syntax errors. Returns a list of maps, where each map details an error. Returns an empty list if no errors are found.

system.set_bootstrap_config.description: Sets the system's core bootstrap configuration. This is a privileged operation.

time.Now.description: Returns the current system time as a 'timedate' value.

time.Sleep.description: Pauses the script execution for a specified duration.
